errorPage.title: Something went wrong

errorPage.offlineBody: Mosaic needs a connection to load fresh ideas. Check your network and try again.

errors.emailTaken: That email is already in use.

errors.videoTooLarge: Videos must be 50 MB or smaller.
errors.videoTooLong: Videos must be 60 seconds or shorter.
errors.deleteOwnPins: You can only delete your own pins.
errors.cannotSaveBoard: You cannot save to this board.
errors.editOwnPins: You can only edit your own pins.
errors.cannotMessageBlocked: You can’t message someone you’ve blocked.
errors.scheduleFuture: Pick a date and time in the future.
errors.promptRequired: Enter a prompt to generate an image.
errors.aiLimitReached: You've reached your daily image generation limit. Try again tomorrow.
errors.aiGenerateFailed: Couldn't generate an image. Try a different prompt.

landing.title: Discover and save visual ideas
landing.subtitle: A home for the things you love. Browse pins, build boards and follow the creators who inspire you.

profile.blockConfirmBody: They won’t be able to message you, and you’ll stop seeing each other’s Pins and profiles. Any follow between you is removed.
profile.blockedBody: Unblock them from the menu above to see their profile again.

profile.reportThanks: Thanks for helping keep Mosaic safe.
profile.noDrafts: No drafts or scheduled pins yet.

detail.noComments: No comments yet. Start the conversation.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
